name: FETAL EXPOSURE TO RADIATION

definition: biologic effect of ionizing radiation on physical and chemical processes result in NONSTOCHASTIC EFFECT = THRESHOLD EFFECT dose threshold before damage occurs to a number of cells (= multicellular damage) damage to a single cell with exposure to any amount of ionizing radiation increasing
